data.name: Andre
data.title: Fullstack Software Engineer & DevOps Apprentice
data.summary: Fullstack Software Engineer with Bac+5 (RNCP Level 7) and 3 years of hands-on experience building and deploying web applications, automating enterprise workflows, and integrating AI into production systems. Experienced across the full stack — Node.js, React, Azure, Docker — with a DevOps mindset applied in a real corporate environment. Looking for a first CDI as a Fullstack or Backend Engineer in a product-driven team.

Project ownership, initiative, and continuous improvement mindset

projects.title: TransparAI
projects.purpose: SaaS platform for AI-assisted legal document analysis. Built REST API with Node.js/Express, integrated OpenAI for async document processing, implemented Firebase Auth for user management and Stripe for subscription billing.
projects.impact: Streamlined complex legal document processing by decoupling AI analytics from core application logic, ensuring high availability and secure data handling.
projects.role: Systems Architect & Fullstack Engineer. Designed the distributed architecture, integrated Gemini AI, and implemented role-based access control and subscriptions.

projects.title: PlatformPro Jobs
projects.purpose: Serverless recruitment platform automating CV screening with Gemini AI (Genkit). Built document parsing pipeline, implemented candidate scoring logic, and integrated Stripe for payments.
projects.impact: Reduced manual screening operations by automating candidate evaluation pipelines, establishing a scalable serverless event-driven workflow.
projects.role: Systems Architect & Fullstack Engineer. Built robust API layers, managed serverless deployments, and optimized database queries for AI-enhanced search.

projects.title: Freemap
projects.purpose: Real-time geospatial and video communication app. Implemented WebSocket event handling (Socket.io) for live location updates and integrated Jitsi for peer-to-peer video sessions.
projects.impact: Delivered a highly responsive real-time distributed application capable of managing concurrent geospatial queries and real-time video sessions securely.
projects.role: Backend Engineer & Systems Integrator. Orchestrated Node.js real-time event loops, optimized MongoDB geospatial queries, and managed JWT-based authorization.

projects.title: DigitalSentinel
projects.purpose: Enterprise onboarding platform with AI-assisted security training. Built multi-step onboarding workflows, integrated NextAuth.js for RBAC, and embedded Gemini API for real-time Q&A.
projects.impact: Centralized security training operations through a governed learning environment with real-time analytics and verifiable progress tracking.
projects.role: Lead Frontend Architect. Structured the gamified learning engine, integrated embedded AI assistance, and built reusable modular UI components.

workExperience.title: IT Operations & Automation Engineer (Apprentice)
workExperience.subtitle: HDI Global SE France, Paris
workExperience.description:
• Automation: Built batch scripting workflows for XML data import generation → reduced manual processing time by 70% (Python, Batch).
  • IAM & Workflow: Digitalized IT access request workflows using SharePoint and Power Automate, covering 200+ employees.
  • Patch Management: Supported monthly patch cycles and non-regression testing (ALM Octane) across production environments.
  • ITSM: Handled N1/N2 support via ServiceNow and GLPI; coordinated renewal of ~200 workstations.
  • RBAC: Restructured role-based access control across enterprise applications, reducing unauthorized access incidents.

workExperience.title: Software Engineer Intern
workExperience.subtitle: FedHub, Remote
workExperience.description:
• ETL Pipelines: Built data scraping and extraction pipelines (Python, BeautifulSoup) to automate business intelligence gathering, saving several hours of manual work per week.
  • Frontend Refactor: Refactored UI across a hybrid stack (React, TypeScript, Laravel) and applied rendering and asset optimizations to improve Core Web Vitals scores.

education.title: Mastère – Expert en Développement Web Fullstack (Titre RNCP n°39583 — Niveau 7, Bac+5 reconnu par l'État)
education.subtitle: Ynov Campus, Paris
education.description: Bac+5 programme (RNCP Level 7) covering fullstack development, DevOps, cloud infrastructure, and enterprise systems. Stack: React, Node.js, Next.js, Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Azure, Software Architecture, AI & Data Science.

softSkills: Communication and collaboration with cross-functional teams
